summary: Backend security testing complete for Tenant Isolation and Authentication. ALL 27 tests PASSED - security bug fix verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Authentication Required: GET /api/logbooks returns 401 without auth
Authentication Required: GET /api/patients returns 401 without auth
Authentication Required: GET /api/tickets returns 401 without auth
Authentication Required: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without auth
Authentication Required: GET /api/admin/users returns 401 without auth
Authentication Required: GET /api/admin/tickets returns 401 without auth
Demo Login: Demo user login (user@demo.com) returns 200 with session cookie
Demo Login: Demo admin login (admin@demo.com) returns 200 with session cookie
Demo Login: Invalid credentials return 401
Admin Access: GET /api/admin/users returns 403 for non-admin user
Admin Access: GET /api/admin/tickets returns 403 for non-admin user
Admin Access: GET /api/admin/stats returns 403 for non-admin user
Admin Access: GET /api/admin/users returns 200 for admin user
Admin Access: GET /api/admin/tickets returns 200 for admin user
Admin Access: GET /api/admin/stats returns 200 for admin user
Data Isolation: GET /api/logbooks returns ONLY logbooks with authenticated user's user_id
Data Isolation: GET /api/patients returns ONLY patients with authenticated user's user_id
Data Isolation: GET /api/tickets returns ONLY tickets with authenticated user's user_id
Data Isolation: Demo user and admin see different/separate logbook sets
Create with Auth User ID: POST /api/patients creates patient with authenticated user's user_id
Create with Auth User ID: POST /api/tickets creates ticket with user's email and name from session
Create with Auth User ID: POST /api/logbooks creates logbook with authenticated user's user_id
Ownership Enforcement: User can update their OWN logbook
Ownership Enforcement: User can delete their OWN logbook
Ownership Enforcement: User CANNOT update another user's logbook (returns 404)
Ownership Enforcement: User CANNOT delete another user's logbook (returns 404)
Health Check: GET /api/health returns 200 (no auth required)
critical_code_review_comments: Security fix properly implemented - all API endpoints now require authentication
Data isolation working correctly - users can only see/modify their own data
Admin role enforcement working - admin routes return 403 for non-admin users
User ID correctly attached to new records from authenticated session
seed_data_creation: Test created temporary patients, logbooks, and tickets during tests - cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tenant isolation and authentication security tests pass. The security bug fix is verified working: 1) All /api/ endpoints return 401 without auth, 2) Demo login works for both user and admin, 3) GET endpoints filter by authenticated user_id, 4) POST endpoints attach authenticated user_id to new records, 5) PUT/DELETE enforce ownership (returns 404 if not owner), 6) Admin routes return 403 for non-admin and 200 for admin. Data isolation confirmed between demo_user and demo_admin.

security_verification.authentication_required: VERIFIED - All protected endpoints return 401 without authentication
security_verification.tenant_isolation: VERIFIED - Users can only see their own data (logbooks, patients, tickets)
security_verification.ownership_enforcement: VERIFIED - Users can only update/delete their own resources
security_verification.admin_role_check: VERIFIED - Admin routes return 403 for non-admin users
security_verification.user_id_on_create: VERIFIED - New records are created with authenticated user's ID
